description_long: This is a sleek, modern military-style jet airplane with a dark gray fuselage and sharply angled wings. The wings are mid-mounted and swept back, giving the aircraft an aerodynamic profile suitable for high-speed flight. The cockpit is positioned at the front of the fuselage and features a large, light blue-tinted canopy, likely accommodating a single pilot. Twin jet engines are mounted under the wings, close to the fuselage, and the tail section features a conventional vertical stabilizer with horizontal stabilizers extending from either side. The landing gear is partially visible and appears to be a tricycle configuration, with the main gear under the wings and a nose gear at the front. The overall design suggests a focus on speed, maneuverability, and modern avionics.
description: A dark gray, swept-wing jet airplane with a forward, enclosed cockpit and twin underwing engines, featuring a conventional tail and tricycle landing gear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the swept-back wings, forward cockpit canopy, and the full length of the fuselage and tail.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed nose, cockpit canopy, and the symmetrical placement of the wings and engines.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the tail and wing structure.
description_view_3: Top-down view displaying the full wingspan, cockpit placement, and the overall planform of the airplane.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, swept-back wings with no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted under the wings near the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main units under the wings and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single-seat canopy.
